Skill Path: Menace

You intimidate foes through physical menace.

While developing your skills in Intimidation you chose to focus specifically on Menace, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion}.

This path focuses on Physical Menace.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ar2DUlvDK4LDcH9J]{Quick Coercion}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.XFJiGllNZp8Xebda]{Intimidating Prowess}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ePObIpaJDgDb9CQj]{Battle Cry}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.mZttsiWl1ql5NvrH]{Scare to Death}
